breaking.title: West Asia war LIVE: Qatar says no direct U.S.-Iran talks to take place as U.S. envoys Witkoff, Kushner meet mediators in Doha
breaking.summary: U.S., Iran pause strikes but disagree over next steps on talks; Pakistan, also a key mediator, had said talks between Iran and the U.S. would resume on June 30

breaking.title: Highlights: Major Police Op In Germany's Stade After 6 Dead In Mass Shooting
breaking.summary: Atleast 6 people were killed after a shooting rocked the northern German city of Stade on Monday, triggering a massive police operation.

breaking.title: Attackers shoot dead two Guards members in Iran: state media
breaking.summary: It was not immediately clear who was behind the shooting but Tehran has frequently blamed Kurdish separatist groups in the area for previous violence

breaking.title: Venezuela appreciates Indian team’s efforts to help earthquake victims
breaking.summary: The death toll from two powerful quakes in Venezuela crossed 1,700 on June 29, with thousands more injured and many more missing

breaking.title: Mumbai rains: Student killed as tree falls on school bus
breaking.summary: The incident took place around 3 p.m. and a rescue operation was mounted to retrieve the 12 children trapped inside the bus

breaking.title: K.C. Venugopal moves privilege notice against Rajnath for ‘misleading’ Parliament about Operation Sindoor casualties
breaking.summary: The Congress leader said that during the discussion held in July 2025 regarding the Pahalgam terror attack and subsequent Operation Sindoor, Rajnath Singh had told the House that no harm had come to Indian soldiers

breaking.title: Explosion in Monaco injuries 3 including Ukrainian tycoon, and suspected attacker flees to France
breaking.summary: The explosion occurred around 9 p.m. at the entryway of a residence near the French border, injuring two adults and a child who were taken to hospitals in France, Monaco’s Minister of State said

breaking.title: Congress terms donation theft at Ayodhya Ram Temple a ‘maha paap’, questions PM’s silence
breaking.summary: The Congress also demands that the SIT report be made public; the Shri Ram Janmabhoomi Teerth Kshetra Trust be dissolved; FIRs be registered against its office-bearers; and an independent audit be conducted of all donations received since the Trust’s inception
